body_text_excerpt: Inteligência que trabalhapelo seu negócio A IA sugere Toda ação começa como uma sugestão, nunca como algo já feito. Sugestão aguardando revisão Você está no controle Nada é executado sem regras claras de aprovação. Você decide o que acontece. Aprovar Recusar Tudo fica registrado Cada ação é guardada, rastreável e pode ser desfeita se precisar. Agendamento confirmado Mensagem enviada ao cliente Pagamento registrado Automação com segurança, do jeito certo. Começar pular class Component extends DCLogic { state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false }; canvasR

<html><head><style>
    .sc-placeholder{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;overflow:hidden}
    @keyframes sc-shine{0%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing{position:relative;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 5%,transparent);
      border-color:transparent}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing::before{content:'';
      position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(217,119,87,0) 25%,rgba(247,225,211,.95) 37%,rgba(217,119,87,0) 63%);
      background-size:400% 100%;animation:sc-shine 1.4s ease infinite}
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-placeholder:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-placeholder)::before,
    html.sc-dc-streaming .sc-interp.sc-missing:nth-child(n+9 of .sc-interp.sc-missing)::before{animation:none;
      background:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 8%,transparent)}
    .sc-placeholder-error{padding:4px 8px;font:11px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.7);word-break:break-word}
    .sc-interp.sc-missing{display:inline-block;width:2em;height:1em;overflow:hidden;
      vertical-align:text-bottom;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.5);
      border-radius:2px;box-sizing:border-box;color:transparent;
      user-select:none}
    .sc-interp.sc-unresolved{font-family:ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:.85em;
      color:rgba(0,0,0,.5);background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);border-radius:3px;
      padding:0 3px}
    .sc-host.sc-has-error{position:relative}
    .sc-logic-error{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;z-index:2147483647;max-width:60ch;
      padding:6px 10px;background:#b00020;color:#fff;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;
      border-radius:4px;white-space:pre-wrap;pointer-events:none}
    /* Mirrors PRINT_BASELINE_CSS in apps/web deck-stage-export.ts — keep both
       in sync until dc-runtime regains a build step. */
    @media print {
      @page { margin: 0.5cm; }
      figure, table { break-inside: avoid; }
      #dc-root, #dc-root > .sc-host { height: auto; }
      *, *::before, *::after {
        print-color-adjust: exact; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
        backdrop-filter: none !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
        animation-delay: -99s !important; animation-duration: .001s !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; animation-fill-mode: both !important;
        animation-play-state: running !important; transition-duration: 0s !important;
      }
    }
  </style><script>window.__resources = {};</script>

<script type="text/x-dc" data-dc-script="">
class Component extends DCLogic {
  state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false };

  canvasRef    = React.createRef();
  containerRef = React.createRef();

  _transitioning  = false;
  _particlesDone  = false;
  _rafId          = null;
  _touchStartX    = 0;
  _touchStartY    = 0;
  _cleanupFns     = [];

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Lifecycle
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  componentDidMount() {
    this._initScreens();
    this._initCanvas();
    this._initTouch();

    const onKey = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') this.navigate(1);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   this.navigate(-1);
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey));
  }

  componentWillUnmount() {
    if (this._rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    this._cleanupFns.forEach(fn => fn());
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Screen init
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initScreens() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]').forEach((s, i) => {
      s.style.transform    = 'translateX(0)';
      s.style.opacity      = i === 0 ? '1' : '0';
      s.style.pointerEvents = i === 0 ? 'auto' : 'none';
      if (i > 0) s.style.transform = 'translateX(24px)';
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Navigation
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  navigate(dir) {
    if (this.state.currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone) this._finishAnim();
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    const next = currentScreen + dir;
    if (next < 0 || next > 4 || this._transitioning) return;
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, next, dir > 0 ? 1 : -1);
  }

  jumpTo(idx) {
    if (this._transitioning) return;
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    if (idx === currentScreen) return;
    if (currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone && idx > 0) this._finishAnim();
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, idx, idx > currentScreen ? 1 : -1);
  }

  _doTransition(from, to, dir) {
    this._transitioning = true;
    this.setState({ currentScreen: to });

    const c   = this.containerRef.current;
    const all = [...c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]')];
    const out = all[from];
    const inn = all[to];

    // Park off-screen
    all.forEach((s, i) => {
      if (i !== from && i !== to) {
        s.style.transition    = 'none';
        s.style.opacity       = '0';
        s.style.transform     = `translateX(${i < from ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
        s.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }
    });

    // Reset outgoing stagger elements so they don't hold stale transforms
    this._resetStagger(out);

    // Place incoming off-screen
    inn.style.transition  = 'none';
    inn.style.opacity     = '0';
    inn.style.transform   = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '24px' : '-24px'})`;
    inn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

    void inn.getBoundingClientRect(); // flush

    const DUR  = 460;
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';
    const FADE = 'cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';

    // Slide out
    out.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.55)}ms ${FADE}`;
    out.style.transform  = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
    out.style.opacity    = '0';

    // Slide in
    inn.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.65)}ms ${FADE}`;
    inn.style.transform  = 'translateX(0)';
    inn.style.opacity    = '1';

    // Stagger icon → text
    this._triggerStagger(inn);

    setTimeout(() => {
      out.style.transition    = 'none';
      out.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      inn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
      this._transitioning     = false;
    }, DUR + 80);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Stagger helpers
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _resetStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    if (icon) { icon.style.transition = 'none'; icon.style.transform = ''; icon.style.opacity = ''; }
    if (text) { text.style.transition = 'none'; text.style.transform = ''; text.style.opacity = ''; }
  }

  _triggerStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';

    const animEl = (el, delay) => {
      if (!el) return;
      el.style.transition = 'none';
      el.style.transform  = 'translateY(18px)';
      void el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const run = () => {
        el.style.transition = `transform 0.52s ${EASE}`;
        el.style.transform  = 'translateY(0)';
      };
      delay ? setTimeout(run, delay) : run();
    };

    animEl(icon, 0);
    animEl(text, 96);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Touch
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initTouch() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    const onStart = (e) => {
      this._touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      this._touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
    };
    const onEnd = (e) => {
      const dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - this._touchStartX;
      const dy = Math.abs(e.changedTouches[0].clientY - this._touchStartY);
      if (Math.abs(dx) > 40 && dy < 80) this.navigate(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
    };
    c.addEventListener('touchstart', onStart, { passive: true });
    c.addEventListener('touchend',   onEnd,   { passive: true });
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => {
      c.removeEventListener('touchstart', onStart);
      c.removeEventListener('touchend',   onEnd);
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Canvas / Particles
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initCanvas() {
    const tryStart = () => {
      const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
      if (!canvas) { setTimeout(tryStart, 100); return; }

      // Measure actual rendered size after layout
      setTimeout(() => {
        const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const W = Math.round(r.width)  || window.innerWidth;
        const H = Math.round(r.height) || window.innerHeight;
        canvas.width  = W;
        canvas.height = H;

        canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (this._particlesDone) this.navigate(1);
        });

        const run = () => this._runParticles(W, H);
        (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready)
          ? document.fonts.ready.then(run)
          : setTimeout(run, 700);
      }, 80);
    };
    tryStart();
  }

  _finishAnim() {
    if (this._rafId) { cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId); this._rafId = null; }
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (canvas) {
      const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      const fs  = this._fontSize(W);
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle   = '#e8eaf0';
      ctx.font        = `700 ${fs}px Charm`;
      ctx.textAlign   = 'center';
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
      ctx.fillText('ARIS', W / 2, H / 2);
    }
    this._particlesDone = true;
    this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
  }

  _fontSize(W) {
    return Math.min(Math.max(Math.round(W * 0.22), 72), 108);
  }

  _runParticles(W, H) {
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx  = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const CX   = W / 2;
    const CY   = H / 2;
    const FS   = this._fontSize(W);

    // Sample letter pixels from an offscreen canvas
    const off  = document.createElement('canvas');
    off.width  = W; off.height = H;
    const oc   = off.getContext('2d');
    oc.fillStyle = '#fff';
    oc.font      = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
    oc.textAlign = 'center';
    oc.textBaseline = 'middle';
    oc.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);

    const { data } = oc.getImageData(0, 0, W, H);
    const targets  = [];
    const STEP     = Math.max(4, Math.round(W / 88));

    for (let y = 0; y < H; y += STEP) {
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x += STEP) {
        if (data[(y * W + x) * 4 + 3] > 100) {
          targets.push({ x: x + STEP / 2, y: y + STEP / 2 });
        }
      }
    }

    if (!targets.length) { setTimeout(() => this._runParticles(W, H), 300); return; }

    // Shuffle so particles don't converge in raster order
    for (let i = targets.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      [targets[i], targets[j]] = [targets[j], targets[i]];
    }

    const SPREAD = Math.min(W, H) * 0.55;
    const particles = targets.map(t => {
      const ang = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const r   = 60  + Math.random() * SPREAD;
      const vx  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const vy  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const sx  = CX + Math.cos(ang) * r;
      const sy  = CY + Math.sin(ang) * r;
      return {
        sx, sy,
        endX: sx + vx * 30,
        endY: sy + vy * 30,
        targetX: t.x,
        targetY: t.y,
        vx, vy,
        size:  0.8 + Math.random() * 1.5,
        delay: Math.random() * 0.32,
      };
    });

    const T0    = performance.now();
    const DR    = 420;    // drift phase ms
    const CV    = 1900;   // converge phase ms
    const ST    = 340;    // settle/text fade ms
    const TOTAL = DR + CV + ST;

    const loop = (now) => {
      if (this._particlesDone) return;
      const el = now - T0;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

      particles.forEach(p => {
        const pe = el - p.delay * DR;
        if (pe <= 0) return;

        let px, py, alpha;

        if (pe < DR) {
          const dt = pe / DR;
          px    = p.sx + p.vx * dt * 30;
          py    = p.sy + p.vy * dt * 30;
          alpha = Math.min(dt * 2.2, 0.62);
          ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
          ctx.fillStyle   = '#6fa8e8';
        } else {
          const ct   = Math.min((pe - DR) / CV, 1);
          const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - ct, 4); // quartic ease-out
          px    = p.endX + (p.targetX - p.endX) * ease;
          py    = p.endY + (p.targetY - p.endY) * ease;
          alpha = 0.62 + ease * 0.38;
          // Interpolate blue (#6fa8e8) → near-white (#e8eaf0)
          const rr = Math.round(111 + (232 - 111) * ease);
          const gg = Math.round(168 + (234 - 168) * ease);
          const bb = Math.round(232 + (240 - 232) * ease);
          ctx.globalAlpha = Math.min(alpha, 1);
          ctx.fillStyle   = `rgb(${rr},${gg},${bb})`;
        }

        const sz = p.size * (pe < DR ? 1 : 1 + ((pe - DR) / CV) * 0.3);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(px, py, sz, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      });

      // Cross-fade crisp wordmark over settled dots
      if (el > DR + CV) {
        const t = Math.min((el - DR - CV) / ST, 1);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = t;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
      }

      if (el < TOTAL) {
        this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
      } else {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = 1;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
        this._particlesDone = true;
        this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
      }
    };

    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // renderVals
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  renderVals() {
    const { currentScreen, taglineVisible, entered } = this.state;

    const dotColor = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '#6fa8e8' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
    const dotWidth = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '22px' : '6px';

    return {
      containerRef: this.containerRef,
      canvasRef:    this.canvasRef,

      // Nav handlers
      goNext: () => this.navigate(1),
      goPrev: () => this.navigate(-1),
      skip:   () => this.jumpTo(4),
      goTo0:  () => this.jumpTo(0),
      goTo1:  () => this.jumpTo(1),
      goTo2:  () => this.jumpTo(2),
      goTo3:  () => this.jumpTo(3),
      goTo4:  () => this.jumpTo(4),

      // Visibility
      showPrev: currentScreen > 0,
      showNext: currentScreen < 4,
      showSkip: currentScreen < 4,

      // Tagline fade on screen 0
      taglineOpacity: taglineVisible ? '1' : '0',

      // Closing screen
      handleEntrar: () => this.setState({ entered: true }),
      comecarlabel:  entered ? 'Bem-vindo.' : 'Começar',
      entrarBg:     entered ? '#0d2e56' : '#1a4a8a',

      // Progress dots
      d0w: dotWidth(0), d0c: dotColor(0),
      d1w: dotWidth(1), d1c: dotColor(1),
      d2w: dotWidth(2), d2c: dotColor(2),
      d3w: dotWidth(3), d3c: dotColor(3),
      d4w: dotWidth(4), d4c: dotColor(4),
    };
  }
}
</script>


</body></html>

<script type="text/x-dc" data-dc-script="">
class Component extends DCLogic {
  state = { currentScreen: 0, taglineVisible: false, animDone: false, entered: false };

  canvasRef    = React.createRef();
  containerRef = React.createRef();

  _transitioning  = false;
  _particlesDone  = false;
  _rafId          = null;
  _touchStartX    = 0;
  _touchStartY    = 0;
  _cleanupFns     = [];

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Lifecycle
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  componentDidMount() {
    this._initScreens();
    this._initCanvas();
    this._initTouch();

    const onKey = (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') this.navigate(1);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   this.navigate(-1);
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey));
  }

  componentWillUnmount() {
    if (this._rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    this._cleanupFns.forEach(fn => fn());
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Screen init
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initScreens() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]').forEach((s, i) => {
      s.style.transform    = 'translateX(0)';
      s.style.opacity      = i === 0 ? '1' : '0';
      s.style.pointerEvents = i === 0 ? 'auto' : 'none';
      if (i > 0) s.style.transform = 'translateX(24px)';
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Navigation
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  navigate(dir) {
    if (this.state.currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone) this._finishAnim();
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    const next = currentScreen + dir;
    if (next < 0 || next > 4 || this._transitioning) return;
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, next, dir > 0 ? 1 : -1);
  }

  jumpTo(idx) {
    if (this._transitioning) return;
    const { currentScreen } = this.state;
    if (idx === currentScreen) return;
    if (currentScreen === 0 && !this._particlesDone && idx > 0) this._finishAnim();
    this._doTransition(currentScreen, idx, idx > currentScreen ? 1 : -1);
  }

  _doTransition(from, to, dir) {
    this._transitioning = true;
    this.setState({ currentScreen: to });

    const c   = this.containerRef.current;
    const all = [...c.querySelectorAll('[data-screen]')];
    const out = all[from];
    const inn = all[to];

    // Park off-screen
    all.forEach((s, i) => {
      if (i !== from && i !== to) {
        s.style.transition    = 'none';
        s.style.opacity       = '0';
        s.style.transform     = `translateX(${i < from ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
        s.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      }
    });

    // Reset outgoing stagger elements so they don't hold stale transforms
    this._resetStagger(out);

    // Place incoming off-screen
    inn.style.transition  = 'none';
    inn.style.opacity     = '0';
    inn.style.transform   = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '24px' : '-24px'})`;
    inn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

    void inn.getBoundingClientRect(); // flush

    const DUR  = 460;
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';
    const FADE = 'cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';

    // Slide out
    out.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.55)}ms ${FADE}`;
    out.style.transform  = `translateX(${dir > 0 ? '-24px' : '24px'})`;
    out.style.opacity    = '0';

    // Slide in
    inn.style.transition = `transform ${DUR}ms ${EASE}, opacity ${Math.round(DUR * 0.65)}ms ${FADE}`;
    inn.style.transform  = 'translateX(0)';
    inn.style.opacity    = '1';

    // Stagger icon → text
    this._triggerStagger(inn);

    setTimeout(() => {
      out.style.transition    = 'none';
      out.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      inn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
      this._transitioning     = false;
    }, DUR + 80);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Stagger helpers
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _resetStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    if (icon) { icon.style.transition = 'none'; icon.style.transform = ''; icon.style.opacity = ''; }
    if (text) { text.style.transition = 'none'; text.style.transform = ''; text.style.opacity = ''; }
  }

  _triggerStagger(screen) {
    const icon = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-icon]');
    const text = screen.querySelector('[data-anim-text]');
    const EASE = 'cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)';

    const animEl = (el, delay) => {
      if (!el) return;
      el.style.transition = 'none';
      el.style.transform  = 'translateY(18px)';
      void el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const run = () => {
        el.style.transition = `transform 0.52s ${EASE}`;
        el.style.transform  = 'translateY(0)';
      };
      delay ? setTimeout(run, delay) : run();
    };

    animEl(icon, 0);
    animEl(text, 96);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Touch
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initTouch() {
    const c = this.containerRef.current;
    if (!c) return;
    const onStart = (e) => {
      this._touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      this._touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
    };
    const onEnd = (e) => {
      const dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - this._touchStartX;
      const dy = Math.abs(e.changedTouches[0].clientY - this._touchStartY);
      if (Math.abs(dx) > 40 && dy < 80) this.navigate(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
    };
    c.addEventListener('touchstart', onStart, { passive: true });
    c.addEventListener('touchend',   onEnd,   { passive: true });
    this._cleanupFns.push(() => {
      c.removeEventListener('touchstart', onStart);
      c.removeEventListener('touchend',   onEnd);
    });
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Canvas / Particles
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  _initCanvas() {
    const tryStart = () => {
      const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
      if (!canvas) { setTimeout(tryStart, 100); return; }

      // Measure actual rendered size after layout
      setTimeout(() => {
        const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const W = Math.round(r.width)  || window.innerWidth;
        const H = Math.round(r.height) || window.innerHeight;
        canvas.width  = W;
        canvas.height = H;

        canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
          if (this._particlesDone) this.navigate(1);
        });

        const run = () => this._runParticles(W, H);
        (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready)
          ? document.fonts.ready.then(run)
          : setTimeout(run, 700);
      }, 80);
    };
    tryStart();
  }

  _finishAnim() {
    if (this._rafId) { cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId); this._rafId = null; }
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (canvas) {
      const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      const fs  = this._fontSize(W);
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
      ctx.fillStyle   = '#e8eaf0';
      ctx.font        = `700 ${fs}px Charm`;
      ctx.textAlign   = 'center';
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
      ctx.fillText('ARIS', W / 2, H / 2);
    }
    this._particlesDone = true;
    this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
  }

  _fontSize(W) {
    return Math.min(Math.max(Math.round(W * 0.22), 72), 108);
  }

  _runParticles(W, H) {
    const canvas = this.canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx  = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const CX   = W / 2;
    const CY   = H / 2;
    const FS   = this._fontSize(W);

    // Sample letter pixels from an offscreen canvas
    const off  = document.createElement('canvas');
    off.width  = W; off.height = H;
    const oc   = off.getContext('2d');
    oc.fillStyle = '#fff';
    oc.font      = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
    oc.textAlign = 'center';
    oc.textBaseline = 'middle';
    oc.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);

    const { data } = oc.getImageData(0, 0, W, H);
    const targets  = [];
    const STEP     = Math.max(4, Math.round(W / 88));

    for (let y = 0; y < H; y += STEP) {
      for (let x = 0; x < W; x += STEP) {
        if (data[(y * W + x) * 4 + 3] > 100) {
          targets.push({ x: x + STEP / 2, y: y + STEP / 2 });
        }
      }
    }

    if (!targets.length) { setTimeout(() => this._runParticles(W, H), 300); return; }

    // Shuffle so particles don't converge in raster order
    for (let i = targets.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      [targets[i], targets[j]] = [targets[j], targets[i]];
    }

    const SPREAD = Math.min(W, H) * 0.55;
    const particles = targets.map(t => {
      const ang = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const r   = 60  + Math.random() * SPREAD;
      const vx  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const vy  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
      const sx  = CX + Math.cos(ang) * r;
      const sy  = CY + Math.sin(ang) * r;
      return {
        sx, sy,
        endX: sx + vx * 30,
        endY: sy + vy * 30,
        targetX: t.x,
        targetY: t.y,
        vx, vy,
        size:  0.8 + Math.random() * 1.5,
        delay: Math.random() * 0.32,
      };
    });

    const T0    = performance.now();
    const DR    = 420;    // drift phase ms
    const CV    = 1900;   // converge phase ms
    const ST    = 340;    // settle/text fade ms
    const TOTAL = DR + CV + ST;

    const loop = (now) => {
      if (this._particlesDone) return;
      const el = now - T0;
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

      particles.forEach(p => {
        const pe = el - p.delay * DR;
        if (pe <= 0) return;

        let px, py, alpha;

        if (pe < DR) {
          const dt = pe / DR;
          px    = p.sx + p.vx * dt * 30;
          py    = p.sy + p.vy * dt * 30;
          alpha = Math.min(dt * 2.2, 0.62);
          ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
          ctx.fillStyle   = '#6fa8e8';
        } else {
          const ct   = Math.min((pe - DR) / CV, 1);
          const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - ct, 4); // quartic ease-out
          px    = p.endX + (p.targetX - p.endX) * ease;
          py    = p.endY + (p.targetY - p.endY) * ease;
          alpha = 0.62 + ease * 0.38;
          // Interpolate blue (#6fa8e8) → near-white (#e8eaf0)
          const rr = Math.round(111 + (232 - 111) * ease);
          const gg = Math.round(168 + (234 - 168) * ease);
          const bb = Math.round(232 + (240 - 232) * ease);
          ctx.globalAlpha = Math.min(alpha, 1);
          ctx.fillStyle   = `rgb(${rr},${gg},${bb})`;
        }

        const sz = p.size * (pe < DR ? 1 : 1 + ((pe - DR) / CV) * 0.3);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(px, py, sz, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
      });

      // Cross-fade crisp wordmark over settled dots
      if (el > DR + CV) {
        const t = Math.min((el - DR - CV) / ST, 1);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = t;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
      }

      if (el < TOTAL) {
        this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
      } else {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        ctx.globalAlpha  = 1;
        ctx.fillStyle    = '#e8eaf0';
        ctx.font         = `700 ${FS}px Charm`;
        ctx.textAlign    = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText('ARIS', CX, CY);
        this._particlesDone = true;
        this.setState({ animDone: true, taglineVisible: true });
      }
    };

    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // renderVals
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  renderVals() {
    const { currentScreen, taglineVisible, entered } = this.state;

    const dotColor = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '#6fa8e8' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
    const dotWidth = (i) => i === currentScreen ? '22px' : '6px';

    return {
      containerRef: this.containerRef,
      canvasRef:    this.canvasRef,

      // Nav handlers
      goNext: () => this.navigate(1),
      goPrev: () => this.navigate(-1),
      skip:   () => this.jumpTo(4),
      goTo0:  () => this.jumpTo(0),
      goTo1:  () => this.jumpTo(1),
      goTo2:  () => this.jumpTo(2),
      goTo3:  () => this.jumpTo(3),
      goTo4:  () => this.jumpTo(4),

      // Visibility
      showPrev: currentScreen > 0,
      showNext: currentScreen < 4,
      showSkip: currentScreen < 4,

      // Tagline fade on screen 0
      taglineOpacity: taglineVisible ? '1' : '0',

      // Closing screen
      handleEntrar: () => this.setState({ entered: true }),
      comecarlabel:  entered ? 'Bem-vindo.' : 'Começar',
      entrarBg:     entered ? '#0d2e56' : '#1a4a8a',

      // Progress dots
      d0w: dotWidth(0), d0c: dotColor(0),
      d1w: dotWidth(1), d1c: dotColor(1),
      d2w: dotWidth(2), d2c: dotColor(2),
      d3w: dotWidth(3), d3c: dotColor(3),
      d4w: dotWidth(4), d4c: dotColor(4),
    };
  }
}
</script>
